checked_dimensions.name: spec_compliance
checked_dimensions.evidence: specbridge-intake CLI accepts task_id, title, goal, and repository_url. Generates contract.md, scope.json, and evidence.json with all gates true. Creates branch codex/{task_id}, commits, pushes. Emits JSON summary with branch, files_created, and next_command. All per contract.

checked_dimensions.name: acceptance_criteria
checked_dimensions.evidence: specbridge-intake command added to ValidateSet and switch block. specbridge-intake.yml workflow_dispatch action created with task_id, title, goal inputs. Output includes next-step command. All validators and CLI tests pass.

checked_dimensions.name: policy_boundaries
checked_dimensions.evidence: specbridge-intake generates governance files only — no GitHub mutations, no secrets, no deployment, no production. The GitHub Action uses scoped GITHUB_TOKEN (contents/issues/pull-requests write). Existing CI/CD workflows not modified.

checked_dimensions.name: security_rules
checked_dimensions.evidence: No protected files changed. No credentials accessed. Authentication, authorization, billing untouched. The action does not embed secrets — uses GITHUB_TOKEN from the workflow context.

checked_dimensions.name: changed_file_scope
checked_dimensions.evidence: All changed files declared in .specbridge/scopes/issue-143-specbridge-intake-bridge.scope.json. specbridge-intake.yml is a new file, not a modification of an existing protected workflow.

checked_dimensions.name: test_evidence
checked_dimensions.evidence: CLI test suite passes. specbridge-intake command added to ValidateSet so parameter validation works. All PASS, no FAIL.

checked_dimensions.name: ci_evidence
checked_dimensions.evidence: GitHub CI pending for issue 143 branch. Final report marks CI as not_collected. ci_wait will poll after PR opens.

checked_dimensions.name: final_report_honesty
checked_dimensions.evidence: Final report accurately records the implementation: specbridge-intake CLI and GitHub Action added. Risks documented: action write permissions, all-gates-true evidence generation. Completion status is complete_pending_apply_mode_run.

findings.evidence: specbridge-intake sets all evidence gates to true at generation time. This means the operator will execute without a separate human review step. The intake call itself is treated as the authorization signal.
findings.recommendation: Consider adding a -RequireHumanReview flag in a future task that sets chatgpt_audit_approved and review_gate_passed to false, requiring manual gate update before the operator can run.

findings.evidence: The action has contents: write and pull-requests: write permissions. Any user or system with workflow trigger access can create branches and commits.
findings.recommendation: Add an environment protection rule in GitHub repository settings to require approval before the intake action can run, if stricter control is needed.

unresolved_risks: GitHub CI and PR merge pending for issue 143 branch.
All-gates-true evidence generation bypasses manual review steps.
Action write permissions allow any workflow trigger caller to create branches.
